name: RPlog_The_Man_in_Black
title: The Man in Black
summary: In his confiscated office at a former Republic base on conquered Chandrila, the Imperial officer Danik Kreldin welcomes his old comrade Cantrell, now likewise an agent of the Sith warlord Malign. The two reunite, with Cantrell unsettled by a strange inner feeling that he is somehow more than he knows, and reflect on serving the Empire that has finally recognized their raw talent. Turning to business, Danik outlines a plan to crush the local insurgency: a high-ranking Rebel commando has defected and will lead an attack on the Imperial prison straight into a trap, his stormtrooper armor secretly fitted with tracking devices. Cantrell, wary of trusting a defector, voices doubts but agrees to help, and Danik tasks him with using full Imperial clearance to uncover the identity of a Republic "hero," rumored to be a Jedi, who has joined the insurgents. Unafraid, Cantrell lights a cigar and accepts the hunt.
